name: Sixstar
description: Six-point stars from two crossed triangles, the colours swapping between blades on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 4%, 93% 78%, 7% 78%); clip-path: polygon(50% 4%, 93% 78%, 7% 78%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 96%, 7% 22%, 93% 22%); clip-path: polygon(50% 96%, 7% 22%, 93% 22%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
